sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Commerce, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: thin sample pricing confidence. Primary keyword: Commerce housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Commerce housing market; Commerce real estate market update; Commerce home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Commerce; Commerce home selling market; Commerce homes for sale inventory; Commerce days on market; Commerce listing price; Commerce seller market; Commerce housing market 2026; Commerce market update sellers; Commerce median home price; are home prices dropping in Commerce; is now a good time to sell in Commerce. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
